'''âsh-p-t''' ('''kashapat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unanonymize|unanonymize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unanonymize|unanonymize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-p-t
|-
! Lemma
| kashapat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishapat|thishapat]] || [[word:jishapat|jishapat]] || [[word:shishapat|shishapat]] || [[word:kishapat|kishapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushapat|thuthushapat]] || [[word:jujushapat|jujushapat]] || [[word:shushushapat|shushushapat]] || [[word:kukushapat|kukushapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushapat|thushapat]] || [[word:jushapat|jushapat]] || [[word:shushapat|shushapat]] || [[word:kushapat|kushapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushapat|thushapat]] || [[word:jushapat|jushapat]] || [[word:shushapat|shushapat]] || [[word:kushapat|kushapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshapat|theshapat]] || [[word:jeshapat|jeshapat]] || [[word:sheshapat|sheshapat]] || [[word:keshapat|keshapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshapat|thothoshapat]] || [[word:jojoshapat|jojoshapat]] || [[word:shoshoshapat|shoshoshapat]] || [[word:kokoshapat|kokoshapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshapat|thoshapat]] || [[word:joshapat|joshapat]] || [[word:shoshapat|shoshapat]] || [[word:koshapat|koshapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshapat|thoshapat]] || [[word:joshapat|joshapat]] || [[word:shoshapat|shoshapat]] || [[word:koshapat|koshapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshapat|thĂŠshapat]] || [[word:jĂŠshapat|jĂŠshapat]] || [[word:shĂŠshapat|shĂŠshapat]] || [[word:kĂŠshapat|kĂŠshapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashapat|thathashapat]] || [[word:jajashapat|jajashapat]] || [[word:shashashapat|shashashapat]] || [[word:kakashapat|kakashapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashapat|thashapat]] || [[word:jashapat|jashapat]] || [[word:shashapat|shashapat]] || [[word:kashapat|kashapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashapat|thashapat]] || [[word:jashapat|jashapat]] || [[word:shashapat|shashapat]] || [[word:kashapat|kashapat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashapat|shashapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashapat|goshashapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashapat|gokishashapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashapatnĂŒ|shashapatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashapatnknĂŒ|goshashapatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapatnĂŒ|gokishashapatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashapatshĂ«|shashapatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashapatnkshĂ«|goshashapatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashapatshĂ«|gokishashapatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapatro|shashapatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapatnkro|goshashapatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapatro|gokishashapatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapatmu|shashapatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapatnkmu|goshashapatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapatmu|gokishashapatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashapatsher|shashapatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashapatnksher|goshashapatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashapatsher|gokishashapatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashapatng|shashapatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashapatnkng|goshashapatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashapatng|gokishashapatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashapatya|shashapatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashapatnkya|goshashapatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashapatya|gokishashapatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashapatyam|shashapatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashapatnkyam|goshashapatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashapatyam|gokishashapatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapatnĂŒshĂ«|shashapatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashapatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashapatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapatnĂŒro|shashapatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapatnknĂŒro|goshashapatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapatnĂŒro|gokishashapatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapatnĂŒmu|shashapatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapatnknĂŒmu|goshashapatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapatnĂŒmu|gokishashapatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapatshĂ«nĂŒ|shashapatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashapatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashapatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapatshĂ«ro|shashapatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapatnkshĂ«ro|goshashapatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapatshĂ«ro|gokishashapatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapatshĂ«mu|shashapatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapatnkshĂ«mu|goshashapatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapatshĂ«mu|gokishashapatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapatronĂŒ|shashapatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapatnkronĂŒ|goshashapatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapatronĂŒ|gokishashapatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapatroshĂ«|shashapatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapatnkroshĂ«|goshashapatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapatroshĂ«|gokishashapatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapatromu|shashapatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapatnkromu|goshashapatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapatromu|gokishashapatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapatmunĂŒ|shashapatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapatnkmunĂŒ|goshashapatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapatmunĂŒ|gokishashapatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapatmushĂ«|shashapatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapatnkmushĂ«|goshashapatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapatmushĂ«|gokishashapatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapatmuro|shashapatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapatnkmuro|goshashapatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapatmuro|gokishashapatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
